acceptanceCriteria: Reproduce or explain the OpenClaw DOWN plus active-task-count state from a real Command Central session.
Identify whether the failing source is gateway reachability, channel health, ACP/task service, node host, cached state, or status-bar composition.
Update the health model so degraded or partial states are not collapsed into a misleading all-down label.
Add tests covering down, degraded, stale-cache, and task-service-alive combinations.
Verify in VS Code or an equivalent extension host that the status bar renders the corrected label/state.
items.body:
## Problem
The Command Central status bar can show a red 'OpenClaw DOWN' state while other evidence indicates OpenClaw still has active task state such as '1 working · 3 done'. This looks like a broken feature or stale/partial health calculation. Diagnose the source of truth and make the UI truthful.

## Evidence
- Source repo: `/Users/ostehost/projects/command-central`
- Source HEAD: `080b7bc4`
- Handoff key: `CC-001`

## Scope
- Lane: `Health`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Reproduce or explain the OpenClaw DOWN plus active-task-count state from a real Command Central session.
- Identify whether the failing source is gateway reachability, channel health, ACP/task service, node host, cached state, or status-bar composition.
- Update the health model so degraded or partial states are not collapsed into a misleading all-down label.
- Add tests covering down, degraded, stale-cache, and task-service-alive combinations.
- Verify in VS Code or an equivalent extension host that the status bar renders the corrected label/state.

## Verification
- `User created Linear project Command Central and approved adding the OpenClaw DOWN issue`: Proceed with deterministic Linear intake.
- `git rev-parse --short HEAD`: 080b7bc4

## Dependencies / Blocks
- None

## Out Of Scope
- Superseded findings are context only and must not be re-opened by this issue.

<!-- openclaw-linear-intake:v1 -->
items.sourceTitle: Fix false or stale OpenClaw DOWN indicator in Command Central
items.title: [CC-001] Fix false or stale OpenClaw DOWN indicator in Command Central
